exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your family estrangement forward
items: Document your current living situation and identify what changes you need to make to feel safe and stable
Research and contact 2-3 qualified therapists who specialize in family trauma and estrangement
Create a written timeline of key events and patterns in your family relationships
Research and gather your important legal and personal documents in a secure location
Complete a comprehensive assessment of your current support network and identify gaps
Research local support groups and community resources for individuals experiencing family estrangement
